era: 1987-1994. Heavy Grunge. E=9 -- the full commercial expression of the proto-grunge template. Aberdeen origin. Sub Pop to DGC.
associated_musicians: The Melvins (Buzz Osborne taught Cobain guitar; Montesano WA; Deep Six co-alumni)
Green River (degree 339; proto-form predecessor; Deep Six through-line via Melvins)

theory_nodes.concept: FINAL NIRVANA ENTRY. Metal summit closes at degree 340, 94.4% of engine rotation. The arc: TAD (337, E=9, heaviest Sub Pop) → Skin Yard (338, E=7, proto-metal) → Green River (339, E=7, genetic material) → Nirvana (340, E=9, commercial apex). Energy profile 9-7-7-9 mirrors historical arc.
theory_nodes.description: The metal summit closes where it was always going to close.

theory_nodes.concept: The Deep Six through-line: Deep Six (1986) contains Skin Yard + Green River + Melvins. Melvins: Buzz Osborne taught Cobain guitar. Green River: contains Pearl Jam and Mudhoney DNA. Nirvana is the specific synthesis of this genealogy + the Sub Pop heavy tradition (Endino, Bleach). The engine documents the complete genealogy across degrees 338-340.
theory_nodes.description: The most complete genealogical arc in the engine, spanning four consecutive degrees.

theory_nodes.concept: Kurt Cobain: born February 20 1967 Aberdeen WA. Died April 5 1994 Seattle. Age 27. Wife Courtney Love. Daughter Frances Bean Cobain (born August 1992). King County ME: self-inflicted gunshot, suicide. Viretta Park Capitol Hill memorial. Music endures because the songwriting is genuinely good.

cross_references.relationship: Proto-form immediately precedes peak form. E=7 → E=9. Green River holds the genetic material; Nirvana is the full commercial expression.

Sub Pop peers 1988-1989. Both produced by Endino at Reciprocal Recording. Nirvana's commercial trajectory post-Nevermind vs. TAD's commercial ceiling is one of rock history's most dramatic peer separations.
Endino played guitar in Skin Yard, then produced Bleach. The direct production lineage through the same engineer spans the proto-metal origin (338) to the commercial apex (340).

sps_pair.pairing_note: E=9 + E=9 = E=18. THE METAL SUMMIT'S FINAL ENERGY: MAXIMUM. Three consecutive orca breaches against the commercial apex of the Seattle heavy music story. The most dramatic behavioral event in the SPS engine against the final Nirvana entry.

cobain_memorial: Kurt Cobain, 1967-1994. The engine documents with respect. The music endures.
